title: King Charles Laughs Off Baby's Less-Than-Thrilled Reaction to Meeting Him

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: King Charles Laughs Off Baby's Less-Than-Thrilled Reaction to Meeting Him. King Charles was in military mode at his latest royal engagement; The King visited RAF Lossiemouth in Moray, Scotland, one of just two Quick...
